title: Claude Design Tutorial: Build a Website in Minutes with AI
summary: Claude Design is an AI-powered feature by Anthropic that enables users to create website prototypes, presentations, and landing pages from text prompts. It generates functional layouts, UI components, and downloadable code without requiring manual coding.
